catalog.name: cm-brainstorm-idea
catalog.prompt: Analyze my e-commerce platform and suggest improvements
catalog.problem: Got a brilliant idea but paranoid about building the wrong thing and burning time?
catalog.solution: Multi-dimensional analysis to architect the absolute best execution strategy before hardcoding.
catalog.whatIsIt: A strategic analysis tactician acting as your Product Manager. Employs Design Thinking, TRIZ 9 Windows, and Double Diamond matrices to dissect mechanics, marketing, and business risks.
catalog.whenToUse: Exclusively before bootstrapping major epics or refactoring chaotic multi-tiered legacy systems.
catalog.whyToUse: Eviscerates the 'build fast but build wrong' illusion. Forces you into evaluating 2-3 structured strategic options (comparing Pros/Cons) rather than coding blindly.
catalog.bestPractice: Feed it extensive raw User Profile contexts. Consistently execute this prior to invoking `cm-planning`.

catalog.name: cm-planning
catalog.prompt: Plan the implementation for user authentication
catalog.problem: Whenever the AI is commanded to code raw, it violently demolishes your stable architecture?
catalog.solution: Force AI to formulate a comprehensive structural blueprint defining scope before keyboard hitting.
catalog.whatIsIt: The supreme operational orchestrator. Pushes out an architectural blueprint (`implementation_plan.md`) documenting exactly what files undergo structural mutation.
catalog.whenToUse: After the core idea hits green-light status (via `cm-brainstorm-idea`) and identically moments before physically coding.
catalog.whyToUse: Shatters monolithic requests into micro-manageable step-nodes. Pre-reviewing this architectural snapshot rescues you from infinite debugging loops late night.
catalog.bestPractice: Intensely scrutinize the `implementation_plan.md`. Command the AI to patch architectural flaws rigidly before ever approving movement to `cm-execution`.

catalog.name: cm-content-factory
catalog.prompt: Write a blog post about remote work productivity
catalog.problem: Your landing page SEO content sounds incredibly robotic, driving bounce rates up and conversions down?
catalog.solution: A psychological copywriting factory that mimics 8-figure conversion marketers flawlessly.
catalog.whatIsIt: A self-improving content engine imbued with 8+ hypnotic psychological frameworks (StoryBrand SB7, Cialdini's Persuasion, SUCCESs vectors) for elite marketing campaigns.
catalog.whenToUse: Drafting intensely persuasive content mediums: Lead generation funnels, blast emails, commercial blogs, or Facebook Ad hooks.
catalog.whyToUse: Moves away from generative dictionary-text into pure psychological maneuvers. It agitates exact user trauma points, weaponizes curiosity, and boosts global Conversion Rates (CRO).
catalog.bestPractice: Initially define the JTBD (Job-to-be-Done). Trigger the StoryBrand mode projecting your Customer strictly as the Hero, and your Brand as the Yoda-like Guide.

catalog.name: cm-ux-master
catalog.prompt: Design a dashboard for a SaaS analytics app
catalog.problem: Your interface is erratic, spacing grids clash, and the color hierarchies resemble a circus?
catalog.solution: Instantly impose absolute UI/UX design compliance inherited from 48 universal laws and elite patterns.
catalog.whatIsIt: The apex visual intelligence node. Integrates 48 strict UX Laws, thousands of component heuristics, deeply optimizing aesthetic A11y scaling and whitespace math.
catalog.whenToUse: Prototyping new UI layouts from scratch, auditing broken checkout friction streams, or elevating UI consistency globally.
catalog.whyToUse: Eradicates the dependency on highly expensive UX consultation. Acts as a draconian design gatekeeper verifying your aesthetic yields extreme polish and engagement.
catalog.bestPractice: Always pair this engine sequentially with `cm-ui-preview` to visualize its conceptualized mockups before dropping into Tailwind syntax.

catalog.name: cm-ui-preview
catalog.prompt: Preview a mobile app login screen
catalog.problem: A nightmare trying to conceptualize how an AI's code will visually render without compiling?
catalog.solution: Render immediate hyper-realistic mockups strictly locking down design specs before HTML processing.
catalog.whatIsIt: Seamlessly interlocks via Google Stitch/Pencil integration parameters producing live UI graphical snapshots instantaneously.
catalog.whenToUse: Traversing the twilight zone between conceptual ideation and deep coding pipelines to physically validate concepts.
catalog.whyToUse: Iterating graphical elements is hundreds of times cheaper token-wise and time-wise compared to endless CSS refactoring loops. 'Preview before producing'.
catalog.bestPractice: Declare component demands precisely (Sidebar grids, Hero Call-to-actions). Demand exported screenshot renderings immediately traversing processing.

catalog.name: cm-execution
catalog.prompt: Execute the implementation plan for the checkout feature
catalog.problem: Unleashing an AI on gigantic changesheets causes token amnesia, breaking pristine logic boundaries?
catalog.solution: Atomically partition operations, buffer saves, and intelligently string processing simultaneously.
catalog.whatIsIt: The industrial-tier coding execution loop mechanism. Capable of intense batch processing trajectories, anomaly isolation, and non-stop operational perseverance.
catalog.whenToUse: Armed explicitly with an `implementation_plan.md` and prepared to industrially construct the feature sets.
catalog.whyToUse: It honors strict Dependency-First execution flow (E.g. generating DB schemas prior to UI consumption). Audits itself sequentially post-microstep.
catalog.bestPractice: Monitor the `task.md` dashboard progress actively. Refrain arbitrarily interrupting the AI whilst locked in a Deep Execution state unless a nuclear error signals.

catalog.name: cm-tdd
catalog.prompt: Write tests for the payment processing module
catalog.problem: App functions flawlessly initially, but collapses silently via regression every minor patch cycle?
catalog.solution: Draconian enforcement of Test-Driven Development (TDD) engineering absolute structural shields.
catalog.whatIsIt: Pure TDD dogma enforcer. Physically authors logical assertions (Unit/Integration) *before* spawning the core algorithm logic designed to clear the test constraints.
catalog.whenToUse: Absolutely fundamental dictation when handling core mathematical layers, payment gateways, complex state mutations, or critical endpoints.
catalog.whyToUse: Guarantees mission-critical infrastructure operates immune to silent regression creeping. Green test matrices equal zero-anxiety nocturnal deployments.
catalog.bestPractice: Never disregard utility function coverage metrics. Command the AI to ingest your custom Jest/Vitest configuration specifications thoroughly.

catalog.name: cm-debugging
catalog.prompt: Debug why the login page crashes on mobile
catalog.problem: Hitting an anomaly and the AI guesses wildly, altering stable dependencies while deteriorating the stack?
catalog.solution: Implement surgical Root Cause methodologies replacing volatile wild-guess patchwork immediately.
catalog.whatIsIt: A methodical trace forensics instrument. Recursively scans the data flow pipelines, unravels terminal output, and isolates exact structural node failures surgically.
catalog.whenToUse: Confronted by visible UI rendering fracturing, terminal compilation panics, or logic chains returning catastrophic mutations.
catalog.whyToUse: Standard unstructured debugging usually annihilates secondary logic clusters. This technique isolates the infection, deploying a single targeted patch conserving absolute context stability.
catalog.bestPractice: Deliver raw unadulterated Error Stack Traces. Explicitly instruct it: 'Analyze Root Cause precisely' prior to ever granting file-write authorization.

catalog.name: cm-code-review
catalog.prompt: Review the latest pull request for the API module
catalog.problem: Terrified to merge foreign or rapid code injections out of fear they harbor security/technical decay?
catalog.solution: Deploy a merciless automated Senior Engineer verification protocol gating your main branch.
catalog.whatIsIt: An exhaustive Pull Request surveillance apparatus. Critiques invisible Code Smells, algorithm latency bottlenecks, reusability scaling, and security liabilities.
catalog.whenToUse: Concluding feature isolation arcs, right before attempting branch merging matrices, or retro-auditing massive legacy refactors.
catalog.whyToUse: Decimates the requirement for Senior human reviewers constantly standing by. Recommends intensely elegant structural refactoring permutations proactively decreasing Tech Debt.
catalog.bestPractice: Ask the AI directly: 'Identify the top 3 Technical Debt consequences introducing this specific implementation will forge long-term'.

catalog.name: cm-quality-gate
catalog.prompt: Run quality gate before deploying to production
catalog.problem: The classic 'It runs perfect on my localhost!' transitioning into a blazing server collapse deployment?
catalog.solution: The uncompromising iron Quality Gate checkpoint. Failure to pass = Absolute deployment prohibition.
catalog.whatIsIt: The ultimate CI validation blockade. Enforces zero-leniency clears over Linting aesthetics, Test pass rates, TypeScript bindings, and Security vulnerability scanners.
catalog.whenToUse: MANDATORY checkpoint directly preceding any activation of the `cm-safe-deploy` command or concluding your two-week Scrum Sprint cycles.
catalog.whyToUse: Anchors the RARV (Review-Audit-Resolve-Verify) standard. Violently blocks humiliating service outages stemming from simple undefined tokens or broken logic gates.
catalog.bestPractice: Never under any administrative pressure bypass the execution check of this QA Gate checkpoint.

catalog.name: cm-test-gate
catalog.prompt: Set up test infrastructure for my Next.js project
catalog.problem: Acknowledging Testing is paramount but entirely lost configuring the sophisticated infrastructure properly?
catalog.solution: Instantiate robust automated testing CI foundations systematically strictly by the book.
catalog.whatIsIt: Testing infrastructure scaffolding authority. Sets up the backbone array (Vitest, Jest, Cypress), environment profiles, and Husky pre-commit defensive mechanisms.
catalog.whenToUse: Booting an entirely fresh repository, or salvaging an older legacy codebase devoid of comprehensive structural verification standards.
catalog.whyToUse: Integrating Test Gates on Day 1 catalyzes massive horizontal project scaling capability without internal fracturing. It pre-populates dummy specs mapping out behavior.
catalog.bestPractice: Trigger this initialization explicitly early, normally as the direct sequential operational step after clearing `cm-project-bootstrap`.

catalog.name: cm-terminal
catalog.prompt: Run and monitor the build process
catalog.problem: Long-haul background compilations or terminal operations spew unnoticed critical warnings inducing invisible crashes?
catalog.solution: Impose hyper-intelligent oversight spanning all terminal and shell execution processes instantly.
catalog.whatIsIt: A dedicated supervisory overlay for Terminal executions—capturing NPM dependency installations, build engines, or headless daemon dev environments actively.
catalog.whenToUse: Whenever authorizing heavily destructive directory commands or package cascades known to traditionally generate dense obscure warning streams.
catalog.whyToUse: Aggressively checks AI 'fire and forget' tendencies. The unit methodically translates terminal feedback, pauses for process resolution, and neutralizes rogue exits carefully.
catalog.bestPractice: Monitor and enforce its command restriction boundaries. Ask it dynamically to dump diagnostic log buffers if an unhandled backend process mysteriously evaporates.

catalog.name: cm-safe-deploy
catalog.prompt: Deploy the staging build to Cloudflare Pages
catalog.problem: Does triggering the 'Deploy' sequence invoke intense anxiety and fear of irreversible domain outages?
catalog.solution: An 8-Gate verification deployment protocol verifying holistic integrity before superseding live data arrays.
catalog.whatIsIt: Zero-downtime automated deployment orchestrator. Fluidly connects with Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, or custom raw VPS server configurations gracefully.
catalog.whenToUse: Progressing verified staging code integrations over the threshold into global Production/Live environment status updates.
catalog.whyToUse: Alleviates the immense psychological friction attached to shipping internet products. Prioritizes indestructible rollback systems instantaneously shielding users if a build is fundamentally toxic.
catalog.bestPractice: Obligatorily sequence this protocol exclusively only after achieving a full-green certification run from your `cm-quality-gate`.

catalog.name: cm-project-bootstrap
catalog.prompt: Bootstrap a new SaaS project with Next.js
catalog.problem: The introductory configurations feel like an endless repeating chore: tailwind, git, eslint, routing setup...
catalog.solution: Instantiate total enterprise-grade structural configurations universally under a rapid minute.
catalog.whatIsIt: Paramount project initialization scaffold. Bakes in structural directory perfection, staging profiles, pre-configured i18n support, SEO metadata layers out of the box.
catalog.whenToUse: Ground Zero momentum initializing a completely empty project canvas.
catalog.whyToUse: Constructing upon a shaky foundational structure guarantees collapse later. Executing this standard magnifies developmental agility 10x throughout subsequent development months.
catalog.bestPractice: Ensure correct organizational nomenclature (Domain, Project Title) when prompted, allowing the Identity Guard mechanisms to calibrate seamlessly.

catalog.name: cm-git-worktrees
catalog.prompt: Create a worktree for the new payment feature
catalog.problem: Halfway configuring deep logic when an immediate Live bug detonates; switching branches yields absolute Git apocalyptic conflicts?
catalog.solution: Activate Git Worktree multiplexing, allowing multi-stream operations without shedding uncommitted code progress.
catalog.whatIsIt: An elite branching parallelization tool. Worktrees instantiate isolated physical folder variants synchronized to a singular central git repository simultaneously.
catalog.whenToUse: Extremely critical when forced to suspend highly-complex uncommitted algorithms to resolve catastrophic sudden high-tier organizational demands.
catalog.whyToUse: Eradicates the volatile 'git stash' inferno. Eliminates excruciating `node_modules` reconfiguration wait-times. Operational context streams remain hermetically sealed and safe from tampering.
catalog.bestPractice: Always prune and delete the isolated worktree directory securely once the temporary branch has achieved successful final merger integration to save SSD capacities.

catalog.name: cm-safe-i18n
catalog.prompt: Translate the app from English to Vietnamese
catalog.problem: Generative AI multi-translation iterations capriciously obliterate core internal logic values or semantic HTML structures?
catalog.solution: Absolute bulletproof localization matrices guaranteeing zero distortion in structural application frameworks.
catalog.whatIsIt: Massive multi-pass array translation engine running distinct languages synchronously. Applies raw regex differential analysis ensuring structural components stay completely immaculate.
catalog.whenToUse: Geographically scaling applications incorporating dense dual locales (E.g. processing Korean, Vietnamese, or custom English integrations globally).
catalog.whyToUse: Forged directly directly in the fires of catastrophic AI-refactoring wipeouts. It integrates an 8-layer structural audit enforcing variables and DIV architectures stay entirely intact perpetually.
catalog.bestPractice: Mandate parsing minimal JSON blocks strictly beneath 2,000 text lines to prevent extensive recursive hallucination tendencies in the LLM.

catalog.name: cm-readit
catalog.prompt: Add text-to-speech reading mode to my blog
catalog.problem: Text-heavy domain articles massively fatigue user optics culminating in devastating Bounce Rates rapidly?
catalog.solution: Algorithmically transcribe dense typographical realms into digestible Podcast/Audio player modules proactively.
catalog.whatIsIt: Fully loaded Text-to-Speech (TTS) module architecture equipped intricately with interface players and Voice Activation CRO optimization triggers.
catalog.whenToUse: Across extensively formatted academic manuals, storytelling marketing landing paths, and dense analytical journalism sectors prioritizing distinct interactivity.
catalog.whyToUse: Substantially augments User Retention metrics. Listening mandates passive involvement. Massively supports Web Accessibility A11y while distinguishing overall media interactions.
catalog.bestPractice: Integrate refined seamless Web Speech Engine configurations, or synchronize precisely generated high-definition Voice Actor MP3 rendering arrays.

catalog.name: cm-secret-shield
catalog.prompt: Scan the repo for exposed API keys
catalog.problem: Routinely exposing private Cloud Database keys or Secret Tokens over to Public GitHub feeds triggering massive global breaches?
catalog.solution: An impermeable early-warning barrier annihilating unencrypted credential anomalies natively at the push horizon.
catalog.whatIsIt: A ubiquitous cryptographic scanner instrument armed with intense regex logic sniffing AWS, JWT tokens, Stripe Secrets systematically bound strictly the localized Git hook level.
catalog.whenToUse: Perpetually active in stealth sequence. However, specifically deploy the manual forced scan protocol previous to substantial complex network merges.
catalog.whyToUse: Revealing organizational logic hashes guarantees absolute vulnerability exploitation by rogue actors. This intelligence possesses absolute zero leniency for anomalous hex-chains.
catalog.bestPractice: Evacuate all sensitive variable arrays into a distinct `.env` container, checking explicitly thrice that `.env` forms the bedrock of your `.gitignore` protocol.

catalog.name: cm-identity-guard
catalog.prompt: Verify git config before pushing to production
catalog.problem: Co-mingling agency and individual workstation configurations leads to disastrously compromised corporate deployments to competing accounts?
catalog.solution: Identity gating matrices verifying terminal profile identities correlate identically with organizational destination targets.
catalog.whatIsIt: Total Git Configuration and structural credential lockdown engine. Unilaterally paralyses deployment scripts detecting profile mismatched variables (E.g. email mismatches).
catalog.whenToUse: Triggered inherently upon executing `cm-safe-deploy`. Outstanding diagnostic layer for independent multi-client agency developers orchestrating synchronous configurations.
catalog.whyToUse: Safeguards intellectual domains and proprietary organizational vectors. Ensures highly confidential SaaS algorithms NEVER mistakenly sync over external or unauthorized network hosts.
catalog.bestPractice: Set up strict segregated environmental folders and uniquely assert `--local` configuration bounds specifically per isolated directory.

catalog.name: cm-ads-tracker
catalog.prompt: Set up Facebook Pixel and Google Ads tracking
catalog.problem: Bleeding advertising revenue blindly whilst Conversion Tracking fails inherently due to fragmented logic or external browser blockers?
catalog.solution: Enterprise Standard Server-Side telemetry configurations structurally formulated instantaneously with clinical precision.
catalog.whatIsIt: The CRO Data Telemetry Architect. In under moments, array Meta CAPI limits, TikTok Event interfaces, standardized Google TM parameters and unified Enhanced Conversions mappings.
catalog.whenToUse: MANDATORY configuration before any digital product is subjected to inbound funnel advertisement campaigns requesting concrete ROI analytic generation.
catalog.whyToUse: Without accurate data, AI Advertising Engines hallucinate targeting profiles. This utility engineers a pristine operational 'Datalayer' to capture signals unbreakably flawlessly.
catalog.bestPractice: Input exact localized Pixel strings reliably; explicitly define to the algorithm specifically which interface elements signify a fundamental 'Lead' versus an ultimate 'Purchase'.

catalog.name: cm-continuity
catalog.prompt: पिछले सत्र से संदर्भ लोड करें
catalog.problem: कार्य सत्र समाप्त करने पर AI की स्मृति पूरी तरह मिट जाती है, जिससे अगली सुबह दर्दनाक संदर्भ पुनर्लोडिंग होता है?
catalog.solution: मस्तिष्क से प्रेरित 4-स्तरीय स्मृति प्रणाली जिसमें एबिंगहॉस क्षय, स्कोप्ड लर्निंग्स और स्वचालित मेमोरी ऑडिट — सत्रों को स्थायी रूप से जोड़ता है।
catalog.whatIsIt: अंतिम मेमोरी इंजन। स्तर 1: संवेदी (सत्र-अंतर्गत चर)। स्तर 2: कार्य स्मृति (CONTINUITY.md)। स्तर 3: दीर्घकालिक (TTL और scope के साथ learnings.json + decisions.json)। स्तर 4: बाहरी सिमेंटिक (बड़े कोडबेस के लिए वैकल्पिक qmd एकीकरण)।
catalog.whenToUse: हमेशा पृष्ठभूमि प्रोटोकॉल के रूप में सक्रिय। सत्र शुरू होने पर पढ़ें, सत्र समाप्त होने पर अपडेट करें। त्रुटि पर — scope टैग के साथ Mistakes & Learnings में रिकॉर्ड करें। महत्वपूर्ण निर्णय पर — तर्क के साथ रिकॉर्ड करें।
catalog.whyToUse: LLM संदर्भ हानि को पूरी तरह समाप्त करता है। Memory Audit Protocol स्वचालित रूप से पुरानी लर्निंग्स को क्षय करता है (एबिंगहॉस प्रेरित), टकराव का पता लगाता है, और मॉड्यूल scope से फ़िल्टर करता है — AI केवल प्रासंगिक सामग्री पढ़ता है।
catalog.bestPractice: हर लर्निंग को scope टैग करें (global/module/file)। डुप्लिकेट बनाने के बजाय मौजूदा पैटर्न को मजबूत करें। CONTINUITY.md को 500 शब्दों के अंदर रखें। 50 से अधिक दस्तावेजों वाली परियोजनाओं के लिए cm-deep-search के साथ जोड़ें।

catalog.name: cm-deep-search
catalog.prompt: docs फ़ोल्डर को सिमेंटिक खोज के लिए इंडेक्स करें
catalog.problem: प्रोजेक्ट डॉक्स और सोर्स फाइलें AI की संदर्भ विंडो से बड़ी हो जाती हैं — सैकड़ों फाइलों में प्रासंगिक जानकारी खोजना असंभव हो जाता है?
catalog.solution: अत्यधिक बड़े कोडबेस का स्वचालित पता लगाना और qmd का गैर-दखलदारी सुझाव — BM25 + वेक्टर + LLM री-रैंकिंग वाला 100% लोकल सिमेंटिक सर्च इंजन।
catalog.whatIsIt: स्तर 4 मेमोरी पावर-अप। docs/, src/, मीटिंग नोट्स पर लोकल सिमेंटिक सर्च के लिए tobi/qmd को एकीकृत करता है। MCP सर्वर के माध्यम से इंडेक्स करता है ताकि AI `qmd query 'topic'` क्वेरी कर सके और तुरंत प्रासंगिक स्निपेट प्राप्त कर सके।
catalog.whenToUse: प्रोजेक्ट में 50 मार्कडाउन डॉक्स या 200 सोर्स फाइलें होने पर स्वचालित रूप से ट्रिगर होता है। cm-dockit द्वारा 30 से अधिक डॉक फाइलें जनरेट करने के बाद या जब यूजर ऐतिहासिक स्पेक्स खोजना चाहता है तब भी ट्रिगर होता है।
catalog.whyToUse: cm-continuity का सही पूरक — continuity = RAM (अभी क्या कर रहा हूं?), deep-search = SSD (पहले जो लिखा गया था उसे खोजो)। दोनों मिलकर स्टेलनेस प्रिवेंशन के साथ पूर्ण AI मेमोरी बनाते हैं।
catalog.bestPractice: हर बड़े टास्क के बाद `qmd embed` चलाएं ताकि इंडेक्स ताज़ा रहे। स्वचालित बैकग्राउंड री-इंडेक्सिंग के लिए Git post-commit hook सेट करें। हमेशा `qmd context add` से संदर्भ जोड़ें — यह qmd की किलर फीचर है।

catalog.name: cm-dockit
catalog.prompt: Generate documentation for my Frappe app
catalog.problem: Handing off intricate enterprise apps bereft of operational manuals renders users helpless and obscures logic for consecutive engineers?
catalog.solution: Automated code analysis matrix capable of manifesting exquisite technical manuals from A-Z effortlessly.
catalog.whatIsIt: The internal Knowledge Platform creation bot. Synthesizes Markdown/VitePress formatting explaining deep backend API Reference tables, holistic Persona paths, and explicit SOP parameters intuitively.

catalog.name: cro-methodology
catalog.problem: Landing pages getting traffic but visitors aren't converting — unclear why they leave?
catalog.solution: Evidence-based CRO audit using the CRE Methodology: funnel mapping, visitor research, objection handling, and statistically rigorous A/B tests.
catalog.description: Scientific, customer-centric CRO using the CRE Methodology — funnel mapping, persuasion assets, and A/B testing.
catalog.whatIsIt: A systematic CRO audit engine based on the CRE Methodology. Scores pages 0-10, maps funnel blockers, identifies visitor objections, and designs evidence-based experiments.
catalog.whenToUse: Use when a landing page, checkout flow, or funnel is underperforming. Activates on: 'conversion rate', 'A/B test', 'why visitors leave', 'objection handling'.
catalog.whyToUse: Random optimization fails. This skill forces visitor research before changing anything, ensuring every test is based on evidence rather than opinion.
catalog.prompt: Audit my landing page for conversion issues
catalog.bestPractice: Always research WHY visitors leave before testing solutions. Evidence from surveys, heatmaps, and session recordings beats best practices every time.

catalog.name: cm-jtbd
catalog.problem: Building features users don't care about because you're guessing what they actually want?
catalog.solution: JTBD Switch Interviews + Canvas to uncover the functional, social, and emotional jobs customers hire your product to do.
catalog.description: Customer discovery using Jobs-To-Be-Done theory — Switch Interviews, JTBD Canvas, and Opportunity Scoring.
catalog.whatIsIt: A structured customer discovery framework using JTBD theory. Runs Switch Interviews, builds job canvases, and scores outcome metrics to find underserved needs.
catalog.whenToUse: Use before designing new features, when existing features aren't used, or when validating product-market fit. Activates on: 'customer discovery', 'JTBD', 'what do customers want'.
catalog.whyToUse: People don't buy products — they hire them to get a job done. Understanding the job reveals what to build and what competitors you're actually fighting.
catalog.prompt: Help me understand what job my users are hiring my product to do
catalog.bestPractice: Focus on the Switch Interview: ask about the moment they decided to switch/buy, not hypotheticals. Past behavior beats future intent every time.
